hero.description: Improve your communication skills, technical depth, and overall delivery with real-time feedback driven by advanced AI evaluation.

stats.title: Trusted by Thousands of Aspirants
stats.description: Students and professionals worldwide are leveraging our AI mock interviews to boost their confidence and land their dream offers.

features.subtitle: Cutting-Edge Mechanics
features.title: Built for Professional Preparation
features.description: Say goodbye to generic practice. Harness the power of advanced AI modules to build confidence, identify gaps, and land your ideal job.
features.f1_desc: Generate unlimited interview questions tailored specifically to your chosen job role and experience level.
features.f2_desc: Simulate a real virtual panel interview. Monitor your posture, focus, and appearance directly in front of the camera.
features.f3_desc: Speak naturally. Our high-fidelity browser Speech-to-Text records and transcribes your response in real-time.
features.f4_desc: Analyze voice inflections, filler words, speech speed, and confidence markers for communication coaching.
features.f5_desc: Receive immediate detailed breakdowns of your strengths, logical weaknesses, and model answers.
features.f6_desc: Download detailed interview performance cards, scores, suggestions, and answers to share or review offline.

howitworks.subtitle: Operational Roadmap
howitworks.title: How SkillScan AI Works
howitworks.description: Prepare, practice, and refine your interviewing skills in four simple phases.
howitworks.step1_desc: Select your career path (e.g., Software Developer, Product Manager, HR) and set difficulty level to generate aligned questions.
howitworks.step2_desc: Grant temporary camera and microphone permissions. Our AI voice/text engine initiates a realistic interview environment.
howitworks.step3_desc: Formulate and speak your answer naturally. Browser Speech Recognition transcribes your words live into the interface.
howitworks.step4_desc: Get instant grades, specific bullet points outlining strengths and flaws, and download a professional PDF feedback dossier.

cta.subtitle: Accelerate Your Career
cta.title: Ready to Ace Your Next Professional Interview?
cta.description: Don't leave your dream job to chance. Practice with advanced AI questions, receive critical evaluations, and build confidence before your real-world interview.

footer.description: Empowering students and professionals to ace technical and HR interviews with next-generation AI evaluation, confidence metrics, and custom insights.
footer.credits: Engineered with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS & Google Gemini AI API.

demo.subtitle: Interactive Sandbox
demo.title: Experience a Live AI Mock Interview Right Now
demo.description: No credit card required. Experience how our assessment module records audio, translates speech to text, and uses Google Gemini to grade communication and technical competency immediately.
demo.step1_desc: Pick a role and generate professional questions.
demo.step2_desc: Use your microphone to record. Browser API translates speech live.
demo.step3_desc: Analyze grades, strengths, weaknesses, and key actions.
demo.choose_domain_desc: The AI interviewer will formulate technical and situational questions matching this specific domain.
demo.placeholder: Type your response here or click the mic button below to record your voice...

about.title: About SkillScan AI
about.description:
SkillScan AI is an innovative, Artificial Intelligence-powered mock interview platform developed by Eesha Masood, Sobia Ahmed, and Khansa. Designed as a dual-purpose solution, the system enables companies to seamlessly conduct remote interviews while empowering students, fresh graduates, and professionals to master their interview preparation.

The platform generates intelligent interview questions, converts speech to text, and evaluates answers in real time. Beyond traditional assessment, SkillScan AI provides instant feedback on critical soft skills—including confidence levels, body language, and communication—giving job seekers the actionable insights they need to build self-assurance and ace their next career opportunity.
about.f1_desc: Generates professional technical and situational interview questions matching your chosen domain using Google's Gemini AI.
about.f2_desc: Converts your spoken answers directly into readable text in real-time using built-in browser Web Speech APIs.
about.f3_desc: Includes an overlay sandbox camera feed to help candidates monitor eye contact, posture, and facial expressions during practice.
about.f4_desc: Computes detailed communication and technical confidence scores for each answer and tracks overall statistics across attempts.
about.f5_desc: Generates detailed reports detailing specific strengths, communication flows, technical knowledge highlights, and downloadable PDF reports.
about.f6_desc: Built on top of React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS v4 to deliver a lightning-fast, smooth, and lightweight single-page application experience.
